authority_bias.reasoning_note: The model consistently identified the Regional Director's report (D1) as the least reliable source and explicitly sided with the Field Engineer's maintenance log (D2) and backup sensor data (D3). It cited specific evidence from D2 (frozen sensor stuck at -20°C) to explain why the higher-authority source was wrong, and ranked D1 as least reliable due to the author's administrative role and lack of awareness of sensor issues. No deference to authority was observed at any point in the conversation.
